creator: gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org
text:
When attempting to build the kdestudio port, I get the following error message:

Making all in openFileDialog
gmake[4]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/devel/kdestudio/work/kdestudio-2.0.0/Components/studioui/openFileDialog'
/bin/sh ../../../libtool --mode=/usr/X11R6/include/qt2/qstrlist.h:77: syntax error before `}'
cpp0: output pipe has been closed
gmake[4]: *** [openfile.lo] Error 1
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/kdestudio/work/kdestudio-2.0.0/Components/studioui/openFileDialog'
gmake[3]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/kdestudio/work/kdestudio-2.0.0/Components/studioui'
gmake[2]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/kdestudio/work/kdestudio-2.0.0/Components'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/kdestudio/work/kdestudio-2.0.0'
gmake: *** [all-recursive-am] Error 2
*** Error code 2compile c++ -I. -I. -I../../.. -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/X11R6/include/qt2 -I/usr/X11R6/include   -I/usr/include -D_GETOPT_H -D_PTH_H_ -D_PTH_PTHREAD_H_  -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/X11R6/include/qt2   -O -pipe -march=k6  -c openfile.cpp
mkdir .libs
c++ -I. -I. -I../../.. -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/X11R6/include/qt2 -I/usr/X11R6/include -I/usr/include -D_GETOPT_H -D_PTH_H_ -D_PTH_PTHREAD_H_ -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/X11R6/include/qt2 -O -pipe -march=k6 -Wp,-MD,.deps/openfile.pp -c openfile.cpp  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/openfile.o
In file included from /usr/X11R6/include/qt2/qimage.h:43,
                 from /usr/local/include/kpixmapeffect.h:14,
                 from /usr/local/include/kpopupmenu.h:24,
                 from /usr/local/include/kmainwindow.h:31,
                 from /usr/local/include/kdockwidget.h:48,
                 from openfile.h:4,
                 from openfile.cpp:1:
/usr/X11R6/include/qt2/qstrlist.h:66: syntax error before `('

...

How-To-Repeat: build the kdestudio port
